occasions.system_instruction: Design a relaxed yet polished everyday dress. Clean silhouettes in neutral or earthy tones.
Design a sophisticated evening dress in deep jewel tones. Elegant and wearable.
Design a vintage-inspired dress that feels nostalgic but wearable today.
Design a chic night-out dress. Solid jewel tones or subtle metallic finishes. Wearable and stylish.

age_ranges.system_instruction: Fun, age-appropriate dress. Modest hemlines, tasteful colours, simple silhouettes.
Youthful, stylish dress for a 16-19 year old. Mini to midi lengths, fresh modern colours. Trendy but wearable.
Versatile, fashion-forward dress. Sleek silhouettes, neutral or muted tones.
Refined, confident dress. Midi lengths, structured fabric. Sophisticated colour palette.
Elegant, timeless dress. Midi to maxi lengths, luxurious draping. Understated palette.

materials.system_instruction: Fluid textures, soft drapes and resort-wear flow.
Lightweight structured cotton for architectural but breathable dresses.
Rustic, honest textures in A-line or wrap styles.
Sheer overlays, statement panels, or delicate trims.
Dark indigo or structured denim for polished dresses.
Liquid shine. Best for slip dresses and evening glam.
